## Checklist

- [ ] Runs locally (`pnpm dev:backend` starts without errors)
- [ ] No real secrets committed (`.env` is gitignored, credentials are in `.env.example` as placeholders)
- [ ] `docs/api_contract.md` updated if any endpoint behaviour changed
- [ ] Demo input/output included in PR description or dataset files where relevant
- [ ] Safety rules for complaints are preserved — no auto-refund, no legal acknowledgement, high-severity always escalates
